evals.prompt: Write a search form that works without JavaScript and can be enhanced later.
evals.expected_output: Uses a native form action and method so the search still submits when JavaScript is unavailable.
expectations: The search form submits with native browser behaviour
JavaScript is optional, not required
The form has a server-side fallback
The core task is possible with JS disabled

evals.prompt: Build navigation that works as plain HTML links and can be enhanced with dropdowns later.
evals.expected_output: Uses standard links inside a nav landmark, with enhancements layered on top rather than required for access.
expectations: Navigation works without JavaScript
Plain links are present in the HTML
Dropdown behaviour is an enhancement only
The nav remains meaningful with scripts removed

evals.prompt: Write feature-detection code that enhances the page only when the browser supports the needed API.
evals.expected_output: Uses feature detection instead of browser detection and fails gracefully if the API is unavailable.
expectations: The code checks for capability before enhancing
The fallback path still works
No browser sniffing is used
The enhancement is optional

evals.prompt: Add a service worker registration snippet that does not break the page if registration fails.
evals.expected_output: Registers the service worker only when supported and catches registration failures without blocking the page.
expectations: Service worker support is checked first
Registration failure is handled safely
The page still works when the worker is unavailable
The code uses graceful fallback behaviour

evals.prompt: Write CSS and HTML so a page remains usable when stylesheets fail to load.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the semantic HTML readable and respects user preferences like reduced motion and forced-colors as enhancements only.
expectations: The HTML is understandable without CSS
The core content is present before enhancements
User preferences are respected in CSS
The page does not depend on CSS for access to core content
